sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 3

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 3:1
items.html:
(to the question) Orot Zecharim [male Lights]
If the Lights received in the Partzuf are not weakened at all by their coming from above downward, and they are present below in all their completeness, as they were above at the place of their exit, they are discerned as male Lights. But if they are weakened in their coming below — that is, they pass through a Masach [screen] — they are discerned as female Lights. (p. 758, Item 37.)
